scripts.format:all: pnpm format:yaml:fix && pnpm format:package-json && pnpm format
scripts.fern:build: cross-env POSTHOG_API_KEY="" turbo run dist:cli:prod --filter=@fern-api/cli && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/cli/cli/dist/prod/cli.cjs'
scripts.fern:build:unminified: cross-env POSTHOG_API_KEY="" turbo run dist:cli:prod:unminified --filter @fern-api/cli && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/cli/cli/dist/prod/cli.cjs'
scripts.fern-dev:build: turbo run dist:cli:dev --filter=@fern-api/cli && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/cli/cli/dist/dev/cli.cjs'
scripts.fern-local:build: turbo run dist:cli:local --filter @fern-api/cli && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/cli/cli/dist/local/cli.cjs'
scripts.fern-v2-dev:build: turbo run dist:cli:dev --filter=@fern-api/cli-v2 && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/cli/cli-v2/dist/dev/cli.cjs'
scripts.generator-cli:generate: pnpm fern:build && pnpm fern generate --api generator-cli --local && turbo run dist:cli --filter=@fern-api/generator-cli
scripts.seed:build: turbo run dist:cli --filter=@fern-api/seed-cli && echo 'Run node --enable-source-maps packages/seed/dist/cli.cjs'
scripts.jsonschema: pnpm definition-yml:jsonschema && pnpm api-yml:jsonschema && pnpm package-yml:jsonschema && pnpm docs-yml:jsonschema && pnpm generators-yml:jsonschema && pnpm versions-yml:jsonschema && pnpm products-yml:jsonschema && pnpm product-yml:jsonschema && pnpm version-yml:jsonschema
scripts.definition-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema fern.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.DefinitionFileSchema && pnpm fern jsonschema packages/cli/workspace/lazy-fern-workspace/src/fern.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.DefinitionFileSchema
scripts.api-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema api-yml.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.RootApiFileSchema && pnpm fern jsonschema packages/cli/workspace/lazy-fern-workspace/src/api-yml.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.RootApiFileSchema
scripts.package-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema package-yml.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.PackageMarkerFileSchema && pnpm fern jsonschema packages/cli/workspace/lazy-fern-workspace/src/package-yml.schema.json --api fern-definition --type file.PackageMarkerFileSchema
scripts.docs-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema docs-yml.schema.json --api docs-yml --type docs.DocsConfiguration && pnpm fern jsonschema packages/cli/workspace/loader/src/docs-yml.schema.json --api docs-yml --type docs.DocsConfiguration
scripts.generators-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema generators-yml.schema.json --api generators-yml --type generators.GeneratorsConfigurationSchema
scripts.product-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema product-yml.schema.json --api docs-yml --type docs.ProductFileConfig
scripts.version-yml:jsonschema: pnpm fern jsonschema version-yml.schema.json --api docs-yml --type docs.VersionFileConfig
scripts.ir:generate:go: cd packages/ir-sdk && fern ir ../../generators/go/internal/fern/ir.json --api ir-types-latest --language go && cd ../../generators/go && make install && make generate
scripts.test:update-package: sh -c 'for arg in "$@"; do if [[ $arg == --package=* ]]; then PACKAGE=${arg#--package=}; break; fi; done; turbo run compile --filter "$PACKAGE" && turbo run test:update --filter "$PACKAGE"' --
scripts.python:build: turbo run dist:cli --filter @fern-api/python-sdk && docker build . -f ./generators/python/sdk/Dockerfile -t fernapi/fern-python-sdk:latest
scripts.python:check:fix: cd generators/python && bash setup-python.sh && poetry run pre-commit run --all-files
